content: Remote OK Web Development Specialist Marketers in Demand <h1>Overview<br /></h1><p>We're looking for a Web Development Specialist to build and maintain marketing websites and landing pages for our agency's B2B technology clients. This is a hands-on production role across the three platforms our clients live on most: WordPress, HubSpot CMS (COS), and Webflow.<br />You should be equally comfortable building a custom WordPress theme, standing up a HubSpot CMS site with HubL templates and modules, and shipping a Webflow build with a clean CMS structure. On top of that, the modern web is increasingly about wiring things togetherГўВҖВ”so we want someone who's strong with APIs and can move fast using the latest AI-assisted build tools (Lovable, Replit, v0, Cursor, Bolt) when the situation calls for it.<br />The work spans new site builds, ongoing iteration on existing client sites, landing pages for paid campaigns, and the integrations that connect those pages to the rest of the marketing stack (CRM, analytics, automations).</p><h1>Core Responsibilities</h1><ul><li>Build and maintain client sites across WordPress, HubSpot CMS (COS), and Webflow</li><li>Develop custom WordPress themes, blocks, and ACF-powered layouts</li><li>Build HubSpot CMS templates, modules, and themes using HubL</li><li>Build Webflow sites with well-structured CMS collections and reusable components</li><li>Translate Figma designs into pixel-accurate, responsive, performant pages</li><li>Integrate with third-party APIsГўВҖВ”HubSpot, Salesforce, Stripe, Airtable, custom webhooks</li><li>Build and connect forms, lead routing, and automation flows across CRM and marketing tools</li><li>Use AI-assisted build platforms (Lovable, Replit, v0, Cursor, Bolt) to prototype and ship faster</li><li>Implement analytics, conversion tracking, and tag management (GA4, GTM, HubSpot)</li><li>Optimize for Core Web Vitals, accessibility, and SEO fundamentals</li><li>Collaborate with designers, strategists, and paid media specialists to ship fast</li></ul><h1>Requirements</h1><ul><li>Strong hands-on experience with WordPress (custom themes, ACF, common page builders)</li><li>Strong hands-on experience with HubSpot CMS / COS (HubL templates, modules, themes)</li><li>Strong hands-on experience with Webflow (CMS, interactions, structured builds)</li><li>Solid working knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP</li><li>Comfortable integrating with REST/GraphQL APIsГўВҖВ”reading docs, handling auth, debugging payloads</li><li>Experience using modern AI-assisted build platforms like Lovable, Replit, v0, Cursor, or Bolt</li><li>Familiarity with GA4, Google Tag Manager, and conversion tracking setup</li><li>Understanding of responsive design, performance, and accessibility basics</li><li>Self-managed: can run multiple projects in parallel and hit deadlines</li></ul><h1>Nice to Have</h1><ul><li>Experience with B2B or technology brands specifically</li><li>Familiarity with Next.js / React for occasional custom builds outside the three core platforms</li><li>Experience with Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar low-code automation tools</li><li>Light backend or serverless experience (API routes, edge functions, custom endpoints)</li><li>Familiarity with Sanity, Contentful, or other headless CMS platforms</li><li>Experience building reusable component libraries or template systems</li></ul><h1>What We're Looking For<br /></h1><p>A fast, pragmatic builder who's fluent across WordPress, HubSpot, and Webflow and treats APIs as a first-class tool, not a last resort. The right person knows when to reach for a CMS, when to build a custom integration, and when to use a vibe-coding platform like Lovable or Replit to prototype something in an afternoon. Reliability, speed, and good platform instincts matter more than deep specialization in any single framework.</p> web dev, dev 2026-05-08T07:00:28+00:00 1131516 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-web-development-specialist-marketers-in-demand-1131516 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Principal Marketing Analytics Manager Greenhouse Our mission at Greenhouse is to make hiring work for everyone ГўВҖВ“ so we go to great lengths to hire great people because we believe that theyГўВҖВҷre the foundation of our success. At Greenhouse, youГўВҖВҷll join a team that collaborates purposefully, fosters inclusivity, and communicates with transparency and accountability so we can achieve our mission.Join us to do the best work of your career, solving meaningful problems with remarkable teams.Greenhouse is looking for a Principal Marketing Analytics Manager to join our team! Reporting to the VP of Growth Marketing, the Principal Marketing Analytics Manager owns the analytics strategy, reporting architecture, and performance insights for the entire marketing organization. This is a high-visibility, high-impact role that serves as the strategic engine behind our growth.In this role, you will do more than manage data; you will manage intelligence. You will deliver the analytics, dashboards, and insights required to optimize performance, but your real value lies in your ability to synthesize that data into a compelling narrative.
